descripcion_app: Here you can efficiently manage and analyze your personal finances.
mensaje_inicio_1: Welcome to the My Finances home page.
mensaje_inicio_2: Here you can efficiently manage and analyze your personal finances.
_comentario_resumen_mensual: Texts for the monthly summary screen
descripcion_resumen_mensual: Monthly financial statistics. You will be able to analyze your income, expenses, and balance.
descripcion_resumen_mensual_2: Check the details of your expenses and incomes and the detail of each individual movement.
ingresos_descripcion: Monthly incomes and their difference from the previous month in percentage
gastos_descripcion: Monthly expenses and their difference from the previous month in percentage
balance_descripcion: Monthly balance and its difference from the previous month in percentage
media_gasto_diario_descripcion: Average daily expense for the month and its difference from the previous month in percentage
gastos_categoria_error: No expense data available for the selected month.
top_gastos_mes_error: No expense data available for the selected month.
ingresos_categoria_error: No income data available for the selected month.
descripcion_resumen_anual: Histogram of expenses vs incomes per month in the selected year.
_comentario_ahorro_prevision: Texts for the savings and forecast screen
descripcion_ahorro_1: Histogram of monthly savings in the selected year.
descripcion_ahorro_2: Select the year to obtain the corresponding data, and you will automatically get the evolution of the last twelve months.
selecciona_ano_mes_consultar: Select the year and month you wish to consult
error_datos_ahorro_axa: There is no AXA savings data loaded in the system.
error_datos_ahorro_fiatc: There is no FIATC savings data loaded in the system.
info_diferencia_1: The difference between incomes and expenses for each month is shown here. Incomes are added up and expenses are subtracted to obtain the difference.
info_diferencia_2: The total savings of the year represents the accumulated monthly differences up to the current date.
info_diferencia_3: The average monthly savings represents the average of the monthly differences up to the current date.
info_tasa_ahorro_1: The savings rate with respect to the incomes of each month is shown here.
info_tasa_ahorro_2: The average monthly savings rate represents the average of the monthly saving rates
_comentario_cargar_ahorro: Texts for the load savings screen and its help
instrucciones_cargar_ahorro:
1. Download your NAS (Synology) data file in *.csv format
2. Save it to your download folder and select it using the upload button.
ayuda_exportar_ahorro_texto: If you need help exporting the Savings data, you can click on the following help button 👇🏻
exito_cargar_ahorro_2: loaded successfully and a copy has been saved in /raw
cache_limpiado: ✅ Cache cleared. The new data will be available when navigating to other pages.
titulo_ayuda_cargar_ahorro: Help manual for importing bank data
ayuda_cargar_ahorro_desc_1: The process for downloading data from __Load Data__ is detailed below.
ayuda_cargar_ahorro_desc_2: Log in to your Synology NAS financial data file with your username and password.
ayuda_cargar_ahorro_desc_3: Once inside, select the insurance company sheet we want to download
ayuda_cargar_ahorro_desc_4: Once inside, click on the File option in the top horizontal menu, then Download as, and finally select the __CSV__ option.
ayuda_cargar_ahorro_importante: IMPORTANT: Do not change the name of the file, this already includes the company based on the name of the Excel sheet.
_comentario_cargar_banco: Texts for the load bank screen and its help
instrucciones_cargar_banco:
1. Indicate the **year and month** of the file to be loaded. Follow the indicated format (YYYYMM)
2. Next, select the `.xml` file to be loaded.
ayuda_exportar_banco_texto: If you need help exporting CaixaBank data, you can click on the following help button 👇🏻
error_formato_banco_numerico: The file name must be numeric and follow the YYYYMM format, for example: 202401, which would be January 2024.
error_formato_banco_longitud: The file name must have 6 digits and follow the YYYYMM format, for example: 202401, which would be January 2024.
aviso_banco_procesado: The year and month have already been processed previously.
exito_cargar_banco: Data exported correctly. A copy has been saved in the raw folder and the data has been added to the parquet.
titulo_ayuda_cargar_banco: Help manual for importing bank data
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_1: The process to download data from the CaixaBank account so that you can import it into the __Load Bank Data__ tool is detailed below.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_2: Log in to https://www.caixabank.es/ with your username and password.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_3: Once inside, click on the horizontal menu, on the accounts and cards option, and then on my finances.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_4: Once inside, look for the movements frame and click on its title to see all movements.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_5: This will take us to the movements page, here we have to filter the month we want to add to __My Finances__.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_6: To do this, click on __Period__, select the month, usually the previous month, and click on the blue __Filter__ button.
ayuda_cargar_banco_importante_1: IMPORTANT: include movements related to forecast and retirement funds as a filter, because if you don't include them, they won't be imported into the tool and you won't be able to keep track of them.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_7: Now, the important step is __to list all the movements of the month in question so that they are available on the screen__.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_8: To do this, look with the mouse for a text with a link called __see more movements__ and click it as many times as necessary to show the first movement of the month.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_9: Now that all the available data (incomes and expenses for the selected month) are on the screen, the next thing is to go back to the top of the page and click on the button in the upper right corner called __export__.
ayuda_cargar_banco_desc_10: Finally, we select the option __list of movements displayed on screen__ and click __accept__ and an .xlm file will be downloaded.
_comentario_cargar_caja: Texts for the load cash screen and its help
instrucciones_cargar_caja:
1. Download your NAS (Synology) data file in *.csv format
2. Save it to your download folder and select it using the upload button.
ayuda_exportar_caja_texto: If you need help exporting Cash Flow data, you can click on the following help button 👇🏻
exito_cargar_caja: Cash flow data loaded correctly and a copy has been saved in /raw
titulo_ayuda_cargar_caja: Help manual for importing cash flow data
ayuda_cargar_caja_desc_1: The process for downloading data from __Load Cash Data__ is detailed below.
ayuda_cargar_caja_desc_2: Log in to your Synology NAS financial data file with your username and password.
ayuda_cargar_caja_desc_3: Once inside, select the cash flow sheet we want to download, in this case, it is __called Cash flow__.
ayuda_cargar_caja_desc_4: Once inside, click on the File option in the top horizontal menu, then Download as, and finally select the __CSV__ option.

opcion.selecciona_año: Select the year you wish to consult
opcion.selecciona_mes: Select the month you wish to consult
